2.1.r_code:

meth<- ini$meth
meth

0.22.r_code:
ini <- mice(boys, maxit=0)
meth<- ini$meth
pred <- ini$pred
pred

9.23.r_code:
meth["bmi"]<- "~ I(wgt/(hgt/100)^2)"
meth["wgt"]<- "~ I(bmi*(hgt/100)^2)"
meth["hgt"]<- "~ I(sqrt(wgt/bmi)*100)"
imp.path <- mice(boys, meth=meth, pred=pred, seed=123)
